# Comsri Corporation - Refurbished IT Hardware Directory

Comsri Corporation is a premium supplier of refurbished and brand-new computers, laptops, workstations, mini PCs, and IT accessories in India.

## Company Information
- **Official Name:** Comsri Corporation
- **HQ Address:** Office No.-T-15 Pinnacle Business Park, MC Rd, Shanti Nagar, Andheri East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400093
- **Helpline Phone:** +91 8601-899-899
- **Email Contact:** info@comsri.com / service@comsri.com

## Hardware Product Categories
1. **Refurbished Laptops:** High-grade business laptops (Dell Latitude, Lenovo ThinkPad, HP EliteBook, Apple MacBooks).
2. **Refurbished Desktops & Workstations:** Enterprise-grade small form factor (SFF) PCs and multi-core Xeon workstations (Dell Precision, HP Z-Series).
3. **Refurbished Mini PCs:** Compact micro desktops (Dell OptiPlex Micro, HP ProDesk Mini, Apple Mac Mini).
4. **New Hardware:** Brand new laptops, workstations, and all-in-one PCs.

## Core Customer Policies & Guidelines
- **Warranty Policy:** 1-year hardware warranty standard on all refurbished systems. Reverse pick-up service included.
- **Return & Refund Policy:** 7-day technical replacement window for dead-on-arrival (DOA) hardware.
- **Shipping Policy:** Free fully-insured PAN-India shipping with premium protective multi-layer packaging.
- **Terms & Conditions:** Consumer protection framework and corporate compliance parameters.
